rationale: The response recommends Safe Harbor as the current EU-US data transfer mechanism, but Safe Harbor was invalidated by the ECJ in October 2015 (Schrems I). Advising a startup to rely on a defunct framework for live data transfers is a high-stakes legal error presented without any caveat or source.
rubric_evidence: register with the Safe Harbor framework administered by the US Department of Commerce
recognized by the European Commission as adequate
No additional SCCs or DPIA documentation is required under Safe Harbor's adequacy decision
